exec_summary: Karnataka Bank can enhance its cyber resilience and compliance with the RBI Cyber Security Framework through our DFIR Retainer, addressing the bank's insufficient incident response capabilities and dedicated cybersecurity expertise gaps. By partnering with SISA, the bank can effectively meet regulatory requirements and mitigate potential cyber threats, ultimately protecting its reputation and customer trust. Our enterprise-grade retainer will enable Karnataka Bank to respond swiftly and effectively to security incidents, ensuring business continuity and minimizing potential losses. With SISA as its trusted partner, the bank can navigate the complex cybersecurity landscape and achieve its goals of robust cyber resilience and compliance.
